item.name: Blackjack Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near the Blackjack will magically bring the vessel to life.

mount.name: Blackjack
mount.action: Summon forth the <Emphasis>Blackjack</Emphasis>, or rather, its scale prototype. Exactly where inside it you ride is a mystery best left unanswered.
mount.description: Commissioned by Chairman Tatabaru of Highwind Skyways to develop a new airship, the engineers of Garlond Ironworks produced this scale prototype for testing purposes. Despite its diminutive size, it boasts an impressive loading capacity, and can easily carry you and a few friends.
mount.tooltip:
Good gods, it's the Blackjack!
- Tataramu
